content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.22% with VIX spiking +12% to 18.86 signals risk-off. PSU Banks -1.99%, Realty -2.06%, Auto -1.69% lead decline; only IT and Pharma showing relative resilience. Portfolio is 65% deployed with positions across defensives (FMCG, Pharma) and some cyclicals — managing existing book is priority over new admits today given vol expansion.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23700,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +9.5%, Q4 beat thesis intact, stock near 52w high. Current SL 1075 is ABOVE CMP 1077.60 — self-stopout risk per Rule 15(c) trail-gap discipline. Lowering SL to 1055 (locks in +7.2% vs entry 984, sits ~2.1% below CMP for noise tolerance). This is a TIGHTENING from breakeven perspective (still well above 984 entry), giving the position room to run to target 1135."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at -1.2%, SL 121 still ~2.1% below CMP 123.65. Gold ETF as defensive hedge with VIX at 18.86 still has utility. Thesis intact, no change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +1.7%, Q4 strong (revenue +22% YoY, PAT +14%), stock at record high. Current SL 825 is BELOW CMP 833.30 but only by ~1% — slight trail-gap concern. Moving SL to 820 (entry, breakeven) — this is a LOOSER SL than 825, will be rejected by guardrails. Reverting: keep at 825 effectively means no-op. HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correcting prior: SL 825 cannot be loosened. SL 825 sits ~1% below CMP 833.30 — at the trail-gap floor. Position at +1.7%, Q4 beat thesis intact. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1357.00,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +9.6%, stock surged on Q4 beat + Encora/Cigniti catalysts. CMP 1380, current SL 1356.71 sits ~1.7% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline. Raising target from 1420 to 1450 as stock cleared prior target zone with momentum. SL tightening from 1356.71 to 1357 is a micro no-op — keeping target raise only. Effective: target up to 1450, SL essentially unchanged (1357 vs 1356.71)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at -2.5%, SL 3000 ~0.1% above CMP 2997 — close to triggering. Per Rule 17, do NOT front-run own SL. Defence thesis intact (Rs 33,000 Cr corvette L1, P-17B pipeline), Q3 PAT +74% YoY. SL was sized at entry to absorb this kind of chop. Let it work; if it stops, it stops at the calibrated level."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +1.9%. SL 820 sits ~0.9% below CMP 827.45 — borderline trail-gap. Cannot loosen SL. Q4 record revenue/PAT, three analyst meets upcoming. HOLD; if SL fires on intraday noise the loss is contained at -2.2% from entry which is within budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at -2.9%, SL 1465 ~1.3% above CMP 1445.90 (wait — SL 1465 is ABOVE CMP 1445.90, meaning long SL is BELOW entry but ABOVE current price = stop already in trigger zone). Verifying: CMP 1445.90, SL 1465 → SL is ABOVE CMP, which for a LONG means SL already breached. However stored SL is the floor; engine will trigger when CMP < SL. Q4 PAT +36.6%, thesis intact. Per Rule 17, accept the SL — do not preemptively exit. Hold for the engine to either stop or recover."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +0.5%, SL 1580 sits ~2.7% below CMP 1624.90 — healthy gap. Q4 turnaround intact (PAT Rs 164 cr vs loss YoY), Zaynich USFDA decision mid-2026 binary catalyst. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at -0.4%, SL 2755 ~0.9% below CMP 2779.10. Q4 PAT +47% FY26, Rs 2,300 cr refrigerants capex, sector tailwinds intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at -0.2%, SL 9020 ~0.7% below CMP 9091. Q4 record revenue, 52w high today, brokerage targets Rs 9700-10500. Hold for breakout continuation."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 25,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "NEW POST-ENTRY INFORMATION: Q4 PAT declined -17.4% YoY (vs expected growth), EPS missed consensus by 18%. Multiple brokerage downgrades — UBS SELL, Citi SELL Rs 1060 target, Nuvama flagging 17% downside. Consensus target Rs 1,751 implies -14% from CMP 1989. This is research/analyst-action that materialized post-entry and materially breaks the long thesis. Position at -1.0%, exiting before fundamentals catch up to price. Per Rule 15, this qualifies as new post-entry information justifying exit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at -2.5%, SL 354 ~0.8% below CMP 356.80. Q4 PAT +30.6%, Macquarie target Rs 415. SL is the calibrated floor; respect it per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at -1.9%, SL 10440 ~1.1% below CMP 10560. Q4 PAT +103% consolidated, Rs 12000 buyback provides floor, Rs 150 dividend. Strong thesis. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at -2.2%, SL 472 ~2.0% below CMP 481.65. Q4 PAT +16%, management upgraded India guidance to low double-digit. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1226.00,
      "new_target": 1290.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +1.5%, current SL 1226 = entry (breakeven). CMP 1246.60, SL gap ~1.7% — within trail-gap discipline. SL already at entry; this is a no-op MODIFY. Converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven (1226 = entry). Pharma CDMO momentum intact, near 52w high. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1075 was at/above CMP — self-stopout risk. Lowering to 1055 (still well above 984 entry, locks +7.2%, gives 2.1% noise room)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Raising target to 1450 as stock cleared 1420 with momentum. SL 1357 healthy."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT -17.4% YoY miss + bearish brokerage cluster (UBS/Citi SELL) is new post-entry information that breaks the long thesis. Exit at -1% rather than wait for fundamentals to drag price."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Not admitting new positions this tick despite some BULLISH candidates (THERMAX, TATACONSUM, NUVAMA, BERGEPAINT) for explicit reasons: (1) VIX spike +12% to 18.86 = risk-off tape; (2) BERGEPAINT has Q4 results May 12 — binary event within 3 sessions, Rule 11 disqualifies; (3) THERMAX +14.6% gap-up — chasing extended; (4) POLYCAB, PIDILITIND, CAMS, ABCAPITAL, LAURUSLABS already in book covering capital goods/chemicals/financials/pharma themes; (5) Deployed 65%, comfortable cash buffer for tape volatility. NUVAMA gap +10% needs catalyst confirmation before chase. Will revisit on intraday stabilization.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 65% deployed with diversified exposure: Financial Services (PNBHOUSING, CAMS, ABCAPITAL), IT (COFORGE), FMCG (MARICO, DABUR), Pharma (WOCKPHARMA, LAURUSLABS), Chemicals (PIDILITIND, SRF), Capital Goods (POLYCAB, GRSE), Auto (BAJAJ-AUTO), and a gold hedge (GOLDBEES). BHARATFORG exit is the only proactive risk reduction — Q4 miss + brokerage downgrade cluster is the kind of new information Rule 15 demands action on. Several positions sit near SL (PIDILITIND, GRSE, CAMS, ABCAPITAL) — per Rule 17 these are accepted as calibrated worst-case losses, not preempted. HFCL pending order from 7493m ago (5+ days stale) should be cancelled — flagging for next tick action. PNBHOUSING SL trail addresses Rule 15(c) self-stopout risk."
}
